summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nameh.me V2 email platform - all backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly. Gmail-like experience with Persian/English i18n, 3-column layout, performance optimization achieved.
passed_tests: Backend: All 19 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Auth: Demo login (demo@nameh.me/demo123) returns valid JWT token
Mail Folders: Returns 6 folders with correct unread counts
Email Listing: Returns 10 inbox emails, category filtering works
Email Search: Filters by search term 'security' correctly
Email Actions: Star/unstar/read/unread operations work instantly
Bulk Actions: Multiple email selection and bulk operations
Labels: Returns 5 default labels with colors
Settings: Language/font/signature/theme management
Compose: Email creation with signature appending
Frontend: Auth page loads with custom SVG logo
Login: Successful authentication shows mail dashboard
3-Column Layout: Sidebar, email list, reading pane working
Sidebar: Folders with unread counts and colored labels displayed
Category Tabs: Inbox/Primary/Social/Promotions/Updates switching
Email Opening: Instant opening in reading pane with labels
Checkbox Selection: Bulk action bar appears correctly
Star Toggle: Works instantly on email rows
Hover Actions: Archive/trash buttons appear on hover
Compose Modal: Opens, fills, and sends emails
Settings Panel: Language/font/signature options working
Persian i18n: Complete UI translation to Farsi with RTL layout
Search: Filters emails correctly
Logout: Returns to auth page successfully
Keyboard Shortcuts: 'c' for compose, '/' for search focus
Performance: Folder switching <530ms, email opening instant
